title: Unable to Find "Send Email" Built-in Action in Integration Recipes Builder

posts.author: 0xm3t1 (Flynn .Is)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Community,

I hope everyone is doing well.

I’m currently working on building an integration recipe and came across an issue. According to the Developer documentation, there is a built-in action called “Send email” that should be available for use in the integration recipes builder. However, I have been unable to find this option within the builder interface ( Developer Center).

Has anyone else experienced this issue?

Best regards,

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @0xm3t1,

Said action is not available for the recipe builder. I am sorry about that!

We will soon change our documentation

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: 0xm3t1 (Flynn .Is)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Matias.Monday ,

Thank you for your prompt response.

Could you please clarify if this action has been permanently removed? Additionally, do you know if there will be any alternative actions or workarounds available in the future (to send email) ?

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @0xm3t1,

I believe that action was never part of the recipe builder and the documentation was just incorrect.

I do not have any indications that this will change in the near future, but I can not assure it will not be added eventually

Cheers,
Matias
